projectName.description: Human-readable project name for audit package titles and reports.

repository.description: Selected repo root or fixture root. This does not grant permission outside runtime scope policy.

surfaces.description: All known product or harness surfaces for this project.

inScopeSurfaces.description: Surfaces included in the current audit loop.

safeDataSources.description: Fixture files, docs, logs, or sanitized evidence allowed in the package.

forbiddenDataSources.description: Secrets, private data, generated output, dependency folders, raw locks, or product paths to exclude.

auditPackageFiles.description: High-signal files explicitly selected for the compact external audit package.

defaultChecks.description: Focused commands or checks expected after audit-loop tasks.

maxTasks.description: Maximum tasks that may be generated from one audit report.

acceptedLimitations.description: Known caveats that should not repeatedly generate new queue tasks.

ownerContact.description: Captain or project owner note for ambiguous product decisions.

riskTier.description: Risk tier used to decide approval and packaging strictness.

requiresCaptainApproval.description: Whether queue conversion or execution requires explicit captain approval.
